goals.description: Finish the quick_chore completely before leaving so I don't feel like a slob around cohort_3 tonight.
goals.rationale: I just made a dent (0.27), but that unfinished feeling is physically uncomfortable and mentally draining. If I'm even slightly messy when they arrive, it creates an invisible barrier between us. As someone who values relationships (0.5 weight) above all else, I cannot risk them sensing my disorganization or guilt. Clearing this small friction now ensures I can be fully present and unburdened during our time together, which is what matters most right now.

goals.description: Host/dine with cohort_3, focusing entirely on connection and avoiding any topic that could cause tension or conflict.
goals.rationale: My identity is tied to being reliable and engaged with my friends. Pushing back on them or bringing up stress about the project would feel like a betrayal of our closeness. Being distracted would ruin the vibe, and as an avoidant type, I hate interpersonal friction more than I hate unfinished work right now.
